headline: Paychex Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: PAYX heads into Q3'26 results, with revenues projected to jump 18.3% y/y and earnings rising on Management Solutions growth and steady gains across key segments.

raw.headline: Paychex Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
raw.summary: PAYX heads into Q3'26 results, with revenues projected to jump 18.3% y/y and earnings rising on Management Solutions growth and steady gains across key segments.

headline: OpenAI's first crack at online shopping stumbled. It's preparing for the next wave
summary: Product selection in Instant Checkout remain limited six months after the feature debuted, and it didn't always show up to date item information.

headline: RegScale Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for DevOps Continuous Compliance Automation Tools
summary: TYSONS, Va., March 20, 2026--RegScale, the continuous controls monitoring (CCM) platform delivering real-time compliance automation and regulatory intelligence, today announced it has been included in the Gartner Market Guide for DevOps Continuous Compliance Automation Tools.

raw.headline: RegScale Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for DevOps Continuous Compliance Automation Tools

headline: Gartner CEO: ‘It Can Take a Couple of Years’ Before Investors See the Payoff
summary: Gartner (NYSE:IT) CEO Gene Hall spent most of the Q4 2025 earnings call making one central argument: the company’s transformation is working, the leading indicators prove it, and investors need to be patient while subscription renewals catch up to changes already made. That’s a hard sell when the stock has fallen 35% year to date. ... Gartner CEO: ‘It Can Take a Couple of Years’ Before Investors See the Payoff
